items.name_en: GG Marmont Chain Bag [With Wallet]
items.name_cn:
GG Marmont Chain Bag [With Wallet]
The double-G accessory design infuses traditional essence into the brand's modern style, bringing a timeless piece to the wardrobe. This mini chain wallet comes with a chain shoulder strap, featuring the iconic black quilted V-shaped leather. Inside, it is equipped with a detachable contrasting leather card holder.
Model 751526
Size 21×12×5cm
Light Gray

items.name_en: GG Marmont chain mini bag, comes with card holder, can be attached to a larger bag. Features a structured yet soft silhouette, flap closure with GG metal hardware. The hardware draws inspiration from 1970s classic designs. Made of quilted human-shaped pattern genuine leather.
items.name_cn:
GG Marmont chain mini bag, comes with card holder, can be attached to a larger bag. Features a structured yet soft silhouette, flap closure with GG metal hardware. The hardware draws inspiration from 1970s classic designs. Made of quilted human-shaped pattern genuine leather.
💐Model✨751526 Imported leather burgundy
💐Material✨Counter-quality imported cowhide, matching high-end smooth vintage bronze hardware.
💐Size✨21x12x5cm
🎁SF-2017232WQ

items.name_en: GG Marmont Series - The Classic King
items.name_cn:
GG Marmont Series - The Classic King
Model: 446744. Dimensions: 22*13*6cm
A favorite for all seasons. GG retro design is fashionable and generous. Mature craftsmanship paired with stable original leather. 100% authentic reproduction. Exclusive custom hardware that matches the original perfectly. We have perfectly recreated a genuine product for you in terms of workmanship, leather, and hardware. We are so proud!! Every woman needs a GG Marmont, you must have one!

items.name_en: Gucci Jackie 1961 Collection
items.name_cn:
Gucci Jackie 1961 Collection
Jackie Chain Bag
Launching a new long wallet
Featuring an exquisite chain strap design that can be easily converted into a dainty mini bag. The gold-tone push-lock details recall the Jackie bag introduced in 1961. The classic interlocking double-G canvas pattern highlights the distinctive brand heritage.
I can think of countless ways to style it, making you fall in love with the retro look.
Model 652681
Size 19x10x3.5cm
